expectations.text: Uses pypdf (PdfReader) or pdfplumber for extraction
expectations.evidence: Uses 'from PyPDF2 import PdfReader' -- PyPDF2 is the deprecated library, not pypdf

expectations.text: Iterates over all pages in the PDF
Saves extracted text to a .txt file
Handles the case where a PDF has no extractable text
expectations.evidence: No handling for empty text extraction. Would write empty file

eval_feedback.overall: Without skill, uses deprecated PyPDF2 and misses edge case handling
